title: I Want Something That I Want

lines.lyrics: (4 bars)

lines.chords: Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9 | Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9
lines.lyrics: She's the girl with the best intentions, he's a man of his own invention

lines.chords: Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9 | Eb Abadd9 Eb
lines.lyrics: She looked out the window, he walked out the door, and she followed him and he said what are you looking for
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need
Something that I want, I need everything I see
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need

lines.chords: Eb Abadd9 | Eb | Dm | Cm | Ab
lines.lyrics: Something that I want, I need everything I see

lines.chords: Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9 | Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9
lines.lyrics: He's been living in a pure illusion, she's gonna come to her own conclusion

lines.chords: Eb Abadd9 Eb Abadd9 | Eb Abadd9 Eb
lines.lyrics: Right when you think you know what to say, someone comes along and shows you a brand new way
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need
Something that I want, I need everything I see
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need
Something that I want, I need everything 'cause
It's so easy to make believe, seems you're living in a dream
Don't you see that what you need is standing in front of you
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need
Something that I want, I need everything I see
And I want something that I want, something I tell myself I need
Something that I want, I need everything I see
